proposed_artifacts.title: Redacted Complaint Draft

proposed_tasks.instructions: Review the complaint draft for all personal, financial, and health data. Ensure compliance with data protection principles. Redact all identified sensitive information.
proposed_tasks.title: Full redaction review of complaint draft

redaction_flags.text: Redact full name 'ANFAL ELBUSHRA' throughout complaint draft.
Redact student registration number '40805511' throughout complaint draft.
Review and redact any financial details from bank statement NAP-SRC-0012 referenced in draft.

risk_flags.text: Unredacted personal identifiers (name, student ID) in complaint draft pose privacy risk.
Potential financial data exposure from bank statement details in draft.
Potential health data exposure from NHS form reference.

summary: Audited complaint draft for privacy redactions. Identified full name, student ID, and financial details as redaction candidates. Proposed redacted draft with placeholders. Flagged missing redaction of bank statement details and NHS form health data. Follow-up task recommended for full redaction review.

uncertainties.text: Full extent of financial data in complaint draft is unclear; redaction may be incomplete.
NHS form content may include health data; redaction scope uncertain without full review.
